mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE, MENU_URL FROM COMTNMENUINFO WHERE MENU_CODE LIKE #{_parameter} || '%'

SELECT D.CODE, D.CODE_NM, D.CODE_DC, D.USE_AT, M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_ICON, O.SORT_ORDR FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUORDER O ON D.CODE = O.MENU_CODE WHERE D.CODE_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY D.CODE

SELECT D.CODE_ID, D.CODE, D.CODE_NM, D.CODE_DC, CASE WHEN COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_AT, M.MENU_CODE, M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_ICON, O.SORT_ORDR FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTNMENUORDER O ON D.CODE = O.MENU_CODE WHERE D.CODE_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY D.CODE

SELECT D.CODE_ID, D.CODE, D.CODE_NM, D.CODE_DC, D.USE_AT, M.MENU_CODE, M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_ICON FROM COMTNMENUINFO M LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE WHERE COALESCE(D.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND COALESCE(M.USE_AT, 'Y') = 'Y' AND ( M.MENU_URL = #{_parameter} OR ('/' || M.MENU_URL) = #{_parameter} OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/approve' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-approve' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company-approve' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-approve' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/edit' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-edit' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/detail' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-detail' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/reset_password' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=password-reset' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/list' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=member-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/admin_list', '/admin/member/admin-list') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_list' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-list' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_detail' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-detail' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/company_account' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=company-account' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/admin_account' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-create' ) OR ( #{_parameter} = '/admin/member/admin_account/permissions' AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=admin-permission' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/auth/group', '/admin/member/auth-group', '/admin/system/role') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=auth-group' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/auth-change', '/admin/system/auth-change') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=auth-change' ) OR ( #{_parameter} IN ('/admin/member/dept-role-mapping', '/admin/system/dept-role-mapping') AND M.MENU_URL = '/admin/app?route=dept-role' ) ) ORDER BY D.CODE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNMENUORDER SET SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrdr}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE MENU_CODE = #{code}
